title: Listing Record
description: A listing record represents one offer or product page observed on a specific platform at a specific time. Multiple listings may refer to the same product.

listing_id.description: Unique identifier for this listing observation: ls-{platform}-{YYYYMMDD}-{sequential}.

title.description: The listing title as displayed on the platform page.

price.description: Observed price as a numeric value. Use -1 if price is genuinely not displayed.

original_price.description: The raw price string as displayed (e.g., "¥129", "$19.99").

package_size.description: Package size as displayed (e.g., "30 tablets", "100 mL", "2-pack").

package_quantity.description: Number of dosage units in the package as a numeric value (e.g., 30).

daily_dose_used.description: Numeric daily dose value used in daily cost calculation.

daily_dose_source.description: Source of the daily dose information.

brand.description: Brand name as it appears on the official product or label.

standard_name.description: Standardized product name following a naming convention.

platform_metrics.description: List of platform metric IDs observed on this listing.

in_stock.description: Whether the listing shows the item as in stock. true, false, or omitted if unknown.

shipping_cost.description: Shipping cost if displayed separately. Use 0 for free shipping, omit if unknown.

page_position.description: Where on the page this listing appeared: search_result_N, category_page_N, promotion_banner, featured.

data_quality_notes.description: Notes about data quality concerns (dynamic pricing, login-gated price, etc.).
